translation.literal_translation: And because there is no statement of knowability. (4)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.4: the Sankhya reading fails also because this context does not state the knowability of pradhana as the intended object of realization.
translation.interpretive_note: A concise exclusion-criterion: the target of inquiry must be explicitly knowable in-context.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Sutra is translated at high level and should still be checked against neighboring bhashya granularity.
Interpretive scope of jneyatva here remains tied to the ongoing anti-pradhana argument.
